__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: CO2 working capacity at 400 ppm, 25 °C, 50% RH (ambient DAC set-point) + temperature-swing regeneration energy
predicted_unit: mmol CO2 / g sorbent (at 400 ppm, 25 °C, 50% RH)

operating_conditions.cycle_basis: single isothermal-isobaric DAC working capacity (uptake at 400 ppm minus residual after 95 °C purge)

model_caveat: M3GNet predicts atomistic energies / forces for the MOF framework + guest CO2; binding-energy landscape + grand-canonical adsorption is then derived. The 2.2 mmol/g + 1.8 MJ/kg-CO2 values here are a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: amine-functionalized Mg-MOF-74 / MFM-series adsorption isotherms at 400 ppm + reported T-swing regen energies. M3GNet's notional output is the host-guest binding energy that drives the isotherm steepness at 400 ppm — at this proxy level we record only the literature equilibrium uptake.
proxy_source: McDonald et al. 2015 Nature 519:303 (mmen-Mg2(dobpdc) 2.0 mmol/g @ 400 ppm with cooperative S-shaped isotherm + 1.7 MJ/kg-CO2 T-swing regen) + Sinha et al. 2017 Ind. Eng. Chem. Res. 56:750 (MOF-DAC techno-economics) + Schroder Manchester MFM-series (MFM-300 / MFM-188 amine-MOF DAC corpus); Climeworks $600-1000/t amine-on-silica baseline UNCHANGED per §3.7 + §4.F.1
falsifier_text: capacity @ 400 ppm < 1.5 mmol/g OR regen energy > 2 MJ/kg-CO2 → FAIL

cross_check_papers.title: The Open DAC 2025 Dataset for Sorbent Discovery
cross_check_papers.note: 60M DFT calc on 15k MOFs + ML force fields (Aug 2025) — supersedes McDonald 2015 single-MOF anchor

cross_check_papers.title: Spurious imaginary phonon modes in MOF thermal properties
LitMOF: LLM Multi-Agent for MOF Database Correction
Classical vs ML force fields for sorbent deformation
Intrinsic Direct Air Capture
cross_check_papers.note: thermodynamic metrics independent of system design (Jan 2025)

unproven_markers_preserved: magic-MOF DAC $100/t UNPROVEN preserved verbatim (Climeworks amine $600-1000/t baseline per MOF.md + §3.7 LIMIT_BREAKTHROUGH row)
amine oxidation by trace SO2 + NO2 + O2 HARD_WALL on calendar-life durability
volumetric throughput at ambient 400 ppm UNVERIFIED at plant scale
balance-of-plant heat-exchange energy NOT included in the regen-MJ/kg target
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches (capacity ≥ 1.5 mmol/g AND regen ≤ 2 MJ/kg-CO2) PASS at the proxy literature values. This does NOT close the candidate or refute the magic-MOF UNPROVEN flag: per §4.F.1 risk-flags, calendar-life durability + plant-scale volumetric throughput + balance-of-plant heat are all UNVERIFIED. The $100/t economics claim remains UNPROVEN against the $600-1000/t Climeworks baseline (preserved verbatim per AGENTS.md hard rule 5). SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; Climeworks vendor cost data governs (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
